title: Embedded Linux boot process
description: Embedded Linux boot process documents overview material for Embedded Linux boot process in the system domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights BL1, BL2, BL3-1, BL3-2, and BL3-3, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include u-boot, linux, boot process, embedded-linux-boot-process, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is system / concepts / embedded-linux-boot-process / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
